headline: Is Conagra Brands (CAG) Now A Bargain After A 35% Share Price Slide?
summary: Wondering whether Conagra Brands at US$15.46 is starting to look like value, or if the recent share price weakness is a warning sign. The stock has seen a 3.6% decline over the last week, a 16.3% decline over the past month, and is down 35.4% over the last year. This may change how the market views its risk and return profile. Recent attention has focused on Conagra Brands as a major packaged food player at a time when investors are reassessing consumer staples more broadly. That context...
